title: Lophiolepis × petrakii
taxonomy: Lophiolepis × petrakii is a rare, hybrid species of fern belonging to the family Lopholepidaceae. This classification is within the division Pteridophyta, which includes all types of ferns. The genus Lophiolepis is a group of ferns known for their unique, lobe-like fronds. The species Lophiolepis × petrakii is a hybrid of two other species within the genus, resulting from intergeneric hybridization. As a result, its classification can be considered a part of the broader Lophiolepidaceae family.
